# SBDC find your center ZIP and county locator

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Organization: UH Texas Gulf Coast SBDC Network Local area: Southeast Texas and Houston-area counties Office or partner: Find Your SBDC locator

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns certification, ecosystem navigation, funding during Launch, Operations and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- Organization: UH Texas Gulf Coast SBDC Network
- Local area: Southeast Texas and Houston-area counties
- Office or partner: Find Your SBDC locator
- ## BOSS routing summary
- Use when BOSS cannot confidently choose the correct SBDC center from ZIP alone.
- ## Local service area
- Locator supports search by ZIP code or county.

## People and links

- Organizations: Small Business Development Center (SBDC), APEX Accelerator, University of Houston
- Link: <https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Find_Your_SBDC.asp>

## Next handoff

Ask for exact business ZIP and county. Send the user to Find Your SBDC and tell them to use ZIP or county lookup.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.

## Original document

Use **View original** in the BOSS Library to open or download the approved public source.
